steps.title: Read the scornful tone
steps.content: The setup says the lady gazed disdainfully and had the air of a queen. Her imagined words call the audience upstarts and provincials, so the underlined sentence displays contempt.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: Choice A invents urgency about arriving first. Choice B introduces acting, and Choice C shifts to disliking theatrical performances. The sentence instead illustrates the lady's attitude toward the other theatergoers. The answer is D.
